description: MCP tool definition template for nats-core fleet agents. Each ToolCapability in an AgentManifest maps 1:1 to an MCP tool using this structure.

derivation_pattern.description: How ToolCapability maps to MCP tool definition

example.name: architect-agent:run_architecture_session
example.description: Run a full architecture design session for a project

adapter_code.description: Pattern for MCP server implementations that wrap fleet agent tools
adapter_code.pattern: For each tool in manifest.tools, register an MCP tool handler that calls client.call_agent_tool(agent_id, tool_name, params) via NATS request-reply.
